title: Fix Male Shirts category cover image

requirements.summary: Replace Male Shirts category cover image with uploaded product photo
acceptanceCriteria: The Male Shirts category card on the homepage displays the uploaded photo of the man in the blue printed shirt, not the dhimayu logo.
No other category covers are affected.
The image renders correctly at the category card dimensions without distortion.

file_operations.description: Save the uploaded photo (IMG-20260119-WA0021.jpg — man in blue printed shirt) as a static asset. The image will be cropped and resized to 800x1000 to fit the category card format while preserving the upper-body shot of the model.

Update the category image mapping for Male Shirts (maleShirts) to reference '/assets/generated/male-shirts-cover.dim_800x1000.jpg' instead of the current value. Locate the categoryImages object or similar mapping structure and change only the maleShirts entry. Ensure other category mappings (maleTshirts, femaleDresses, kidsApparel) remain unchanged.
